meta.title: Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery · v12 Caliora
meta.description: Precision oral & maxillofacial surgery in the South Bay. Dr. Jorge Arce — implants, reconstruction, complex cases. Est. 2007.

sections.lead: Comprehensive oral & maxillofacial care designed to deliver long-term results — on the complex cases other surgeons refer out.

sections.head: Popular treatments
sections.sub: Not a list of services — the disciplines refined over twenty-seven years of practice.

cards.title: Dental Implants & All-On-X
cards.body: From a single implant to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction — planned and placed with precision, for patients seeking a complete restoration.

cards.title: Reconstruction & Bone Grafting
cards.body: Rebuilding function and structure where bone and tissue have been lost — the foundation every lasting restoration depends on.

cards.title: Complex Extractions
cards.body: The difficult surgeries other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere — handled with the time and care the case actually needs.

cards.title: Maintenance & Second Opinions
cards.body: Long-term care that protects a restored smile — and clarity for patients facing complex decisions, including when not to operate.

sections.title: Precision Care. <d>Trusted Team.</d>
sections.lead: Dr. Arce trained in Colombia and built his life's work in California. In 2007 he founded the Dental Implants Center of South Bay, guided by one conviction: difficult work, done with care, gives people their lives back.

sections.head: What patients say
sections.sub: Patients and referring doctors, on twenty-seven years of quiet precision.

cards.q: “I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.”
“When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.”
“Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.”
“The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.”
“I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.”
“I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.”
“Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.”
“Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. He sends my patients back with a full report every time.”
“The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.”

sections.fine: By submitting, you agree to be contacted by Dental Implants Center of South Bay. Your information is never shared. · (310) 327-4166 · Redondo Beach & Torrance, CA

brand.p: Twenty-seven years restoring function, structure, and confidence in the South Bay.
